title.en: 5 years ago today, Javier Baez caused one of the worst defensive mistakes in MLB history from the Pirates
title.ja: 5年前の今日、ハビアー・バエスがパイレーツにMLB史上屈指の珍守備をやらかさせた日

summaryJa: 5年前の今日（2021年）に起きた、MLB珍プレー史に残る“ランダウン”。一塁手ウィル・クレイグが一塁を踏めば2アウト目で攻撃終了だったのに、なぜか走者バエスを本塁方向へ追いかけ回し、その隙に三塁走者が生還。バエスは本塁前で『セーフ！』とジャッジのジェスチャーまでキメる始末。スレでは『一塁踏むだけでよかった』というツッコミから、“2アウトだったと今知った”という告白、得点記録の付け方を語り出す野球オタク、そして一塁手ウィル・クレイグのその後（DFA→韓国→現デューク大コーチ）まで話題が連鎖。締めはバッグス・バニー級の名（迷）プレー評で。

comments.author: Real_Body8649
comments.bodyEn: Signaling safe and then running up the line 😂
comments.bodyJa: 『セーフ！』ってジャッジしてからベースラインを走り出すの草😂

comments.author: GreenLost5304
comments.bodyEn: Him signaling safe and then realizing he's still a live runner will always be the funniest thing about this clip to me
comments.bodyJa: 『セーフ！』ってやった直後に『あ、まだ俺アウトになる側の走者だわ』って気づくとこ、この映像で一番笑える

comments.author: ResponseOwn9389
comments.bodyEn: and all they had to do was touch first base and the run wouldn't have counted.
comments.bodyJa: しかも一塁を踏むだけで得点は無効になってたんだぜ

comments.author: Common-Window-2613
comments.bodyEn: No. It was 2 outs with a force out. He was still a force out at that point which makes it so much funnier
comments.bodyJa: そう。2アウトでフォースアウトの場面。この時点でもまだフォースで殺せた…それが余計に笑えるんだよな

comments.author: ReasonableBallDad
comments.bodyEn: I've seen this clip 100 times and never realized there were 2 outs!
comments.bodyJa: このクリップ100回は見てるのに、2アウトだったって今まで気づいてなかった！

comments.author: abbot_x
comments.bodyEn: That's what makes it so ridiculous.
comments.bodyJa: そこがこのプレーのバカバカしさの真髄なんだよ

comments.author: KimHaSeongsBurner
comments.bodyEn: I'm pretty sure the rules of "no take-backsies" says that the batter-runner remaining at the plate to call the runner safe at home negate the force at first. If they try to put the batter-runner out at first after that, the fielder recording the out and the batter-runner will settle whether or not the run counts via a handstand contest, unless the crew chief had a hoagie for lunch that day in which case the runner is automatically awarded home.
comments.bodyJa: 公式ルールブックの『なしなし禁止』条項によると、打者走者が本塁前に残って走者をセーフと宣告した時点で、一塁のフォースは無効化される。その後で一塁アウトを狙った場合、アウトを取った野手と打者走者が“逆立ち対決”で得点の有無を決める。ただし球審その日の昼飯がホーギー（サンドイッチ）だった場合は自動的に走者の生還が認められる。

comments.author: match_
comments.bodyEn: and this is why i always carry a hoagie in my back pocket
comments.bodyJa: だから俺はいつも尻ポケットにホーギーを忍ばせてるわけだ

comments.author: Marinersfan505
comments.bodyEn: Anyone else still find this funny? We were all Anthony Rizzo when it happened.
comments.bodyJa: これ今でも笑えるの俺だけ？当時、俺たちみんなアンソニー・リゾだったよな

comments.author: Squatch-21
comments.bodyEn: I'm Anthony Rizzo right not watching it again.
comments.bodyJa: 俺は今まさにアンソニー・リゾ、もう一回見ないと気が済まない

comments.author: Acrobatic_Flannel
comments.bodyEn: Watching Rizzo pissing himself laughing at the end is the icing on the cake.
comments.bodyJa: 最後にリゾが腹抱えて爆笑してるのが最高のオマケなんだよな

comments.author: juliuspepperwoodchi
comments.bodyEn: Can't decide if this is dogshit defense or brilliant base running.
comments.bodyJa: クソみたいな守備なのか、神走塁なのか判断がつかない

comments.author: Kriegerian
comments.bodyEn: Yes
comments.bodyJa: その両方だ

comments.author: Exodys03
comments.bodyEn: Javy has the reputation of being kind of a bonehead but this was actually an incredibly smart play on his part.
comments.bodyJa: バエスってなんかオツムが残念なイメージで見られがちだけど、これに関しては実はめちゃくちゃ頭のいいプレーなんだよな

comments.author: wballs187
comments.bodyEn: I mean sort of, this is an all time bonehead move by the 1b. If he just steps on 1st this whole play is over
comments.bodyJa: まあ半分はな。これは一塁手の歴史的ポカだよ。一塁踏むだけで全部終わってたんだから

comments.author: RobertKSakamano
comments.bodyEn: Not at all. This is like surviving when being chased by an animal by just being faster than your friend. In this case, he just found someone extremely dumb on the field to outsmart.
comments.bodyJa: いや全然違う。これは『熊に追われた時、友達より速く逃げれば助かる』理論。今回はたまたまフィールド上にとびきりのアホがいて、それを出し抜いただけ

comments.author: b3_yourself
comments.bodyEn: All he had to do was step on first
comments.bodyJa: 一塁を踏む。ただそれだけでよかったんだ

comments.author: ComoEstanBitches
comments.bodyEn: And he was banished the minors and never to return again
comments.bodyJa: そしてあの男はマイナーへ追放され、二度と戻ってこなかった…

comments.author: suddenlynotok
comments.bodyEn: The 1st baseman, Will Craig, was DFA'd the week after this play and was outrighted to AAA shortly after that. He joined the Kiwoom Heroes in Korea in July and was decent there, but wasn't picked up for the 2022 season. Since then, he's had a couple college coaching jobs, and if Wikipedia is to be believed, is the recruiting coordinator at Duke now.
comments.bodyJa: 一塁手のウィル・クレイグは、このプレーの翌週にDFA（戦力外通告）されて、ほどなくAAA降格。7月に韓国のキウム・ヒーローズに加入してそこそこ活躍したけど、2022年は契約してもらえず。その後は大学でコーチを何度か務めて、Wikipediaが正しければ今はデューク大のリクルート責任者をやってるらしい

comments.author: SunkEmuFlock
comments.bodyEn: Man. Imagine finally accomplishing your childhood dream of being in the majors, all the work and effort put in for two decades, and then you last for all of 18 games -- and then your baseball career ends a year later. All because of one extremely stupid play. I would have nightmares about it for the rest of my life.
comments.bodyJa: うわぁ…20年努力してやっと子供の頃の夢のメジャー昇格を叶えたのに、わずか18試合で終わって、1年後にはキャリアごと終了。たった一つのアホみたいなプレーのせいで。俺なら一生悪夢にうなされるわ

comments.author: jordanizm
comments.bodyEn: How in the hell you score that? Fielders choice, RBI, runner advanced to 2nd via 2 throwing errors E2, E9?
comments.bodyJa: これ記録上どう付けるんだ？フィルダースチョイス？打点？2つの悪送球で二塁進塁だからE2とE9？

comments.author: FullPrice4LatePizza
comments.bodyEn: E3 on the advance to first, assist credited to the third baseman. First baseman got the ball in time to put out the runner. Failure to do so is an error per 9.12(a)(3). E2 on the bad throw that allowed him to advance to second base. No RBI, because the error by the first baseman would have ended the inning, and no run would have counted.
comments.bodyJa: 一塁到達は一塁手のE3（三塁手にアシスト記録）。一塁手はアウトに間に合う送球を受けてたから、殺せなかったのは規則9.12(a)(3)でエラー。二塁進塁を許した悪送球は捕手のE2。打点はなし。一塁手のエラーがなければイニングは終わってて得点も入らなかったはずだからな

comments.author: Darmortis
comments.bodyEn: One of my favorite things about baseball, is that the rules seem to be written to explain the insane things that can happen, rather than constrain them.
comments.bodyJa: 野球の好きなとこの一つは、ルールが“イカれた事態を制約するため”じゃなく“起きうるイカれた事態を説明するため”に書かれてるっぽいとこなんだよな

comments.author: MUCKSTERa
comments.bodyEn: And you can still hear my yelling to just go back to first from the upper deck. Kill meeeeeeeeeeeee
comments.bodyJa: 今でも上段席から俺が『一塁戻れって！！』って絶叫してるのが聞こえるはず。誰か俺を殺してくれぇぇぇ

comments.author: prime_number_theory
comments.bodyEn: Die-hard Pirates fan here. This will always be objectively hilarious. I don't care how bad it reflects on our team. I will never stop howling at this clip every time I see it and I'm glad it brings other people so much joy.
comments.bodyJa: ガチのパイレーツファンだけど、これは何があっても客観的に爆笑モノ。チームの印象がどれだけ悪くなろうが知ったこっちゃない。見るたびに毎回吠えて笑うし、これでみんなが楽しんでくれてるなら本望だわ

comments.author: exileondaytonst
comments.bodyEn: The baseball equivalent of Bugs Bunny making Elmer Fudd shoot himself in the face. The idea that you could goad a professional first baseman into forgetting about the concept of a force out at first, one of the most basic rules of the game that we teach t-ball players... it's just the most insane thing you could ever see.
comments.bodyJa: 野球版『バッグス・バニーがエルマー・ファッドに自分の顔を撃たせる』だな。Tボールの子供にも教える“一塁のフォースアウト”っていう超基本ルールを、プロの一塁手にうっかり忘れさせて誘導できる…こんなイカれた光景、人生でそうそう見られるもんじゃない
